name: Catskill Hudson Bancorp, Inc.
summary: Catskill Hudson Bancorp, Inc. operates as a holding company for Catskill Hudson Bank that provides various commercial banking services to individuals and businesses in the United States. The company accepts deposits, such as checking accounts, savings accounts, and certificate of deposit and individual retirement accounts. Its loan products include business loans comprising revolving lines of credit, term loans, letters of credit, bridge loans, and commercial real estate loans; and consumer loans, such as fixed and adjustable rate mortgage loans, and home equity line of credit. The company also offers other services, such as electronic statement delivery √Ç¬ñ e-statement, telephone banking, debit/ATM card, overdraft protection, safe deposit box, and direct deposit; and online banking services. It operates through a network of 11 branches. Catskill Hudson Bancorp, Inc. was founded in 1993 and is based in Kingston, New York.
